'''Dokus''' was a member of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. Whilst on deployment to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], Dokus used a [[DEMP gun/Legends|DEMP gun]] on work [[Droid/Legends|droids]] belonging to a [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmer]] that were denying access to their master's evaporation station.<ref name="ISB" /> Dokus later served in the [[Mos Eisley Police Authority|Mos Eisley police]], participating in an investigation into possible [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] agents with ties to [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The investigation turned out to be fruitless, to the chagrin of Dokus's superior [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Harburik]] and [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Eugene Talmont]].<ref name="ARA" />
